probes.name: season-tables-migrated
probes.description: The `seasons` table exists + carries the latest schema version. Failure indicates a missed migration.

probes.name: season-type-catalog-loaded
probes.description: `data/season-type-catalog.json` parses cleanly + contains every enum value referenced by the SeasonType cast. Failure indicates a corrupted deploy artifact.

probes.name: season-business-type-defaults-loaded
probes.description: `data/business-type-defaults.json` parses cleanly + every seasonal business_type entry has a valid default template. The seed listener depends on this.

probes.name: season-tenant-fk-integrity
probes.description: Every `seasons.tenant_id` resolves to a live `tenants` row. The FK is onDelete=cascade so the DB should never permit orphans; this probe catches direct SQL manipulation.

probes.name: season-current-invariant
probes.description: Every (tenant_id, organization_id, branch_id, sport_key) tuple has AT MOST one row with `is_current = true`. Failure is a data-quality signal; the observer normally prevents this state, but the probe catches drift from bulk-imports + direct SQL.

probes.name: season-slug-uniqueness
probes.description: No two active Seasons share (tenant_id, COALESCE(organization_id,''), COALESCE(branch_id,''), slug). Backed by the partial unique index; the probe verifies the index is in place + healthy.

probes.name: season-date-consistency
probes.description: For every Season: start_date < end_date; when set, registration_opens_at < registration_closes_at; when has_playoffs=true, playoff_starts_at falls within [start_date, end_date]; when late_registration_ends_at is set, it's > registration_closes_at. Catches drift from raw SQL edits.

probes.name: season-purge-queue-drained
probes.description: No `PurgeArchivedSeasonsJob` has been pending for > 48h. Catches queue stalls that could push an archived Season past its 7-year retention window.

probes.name: season-phase-roll-heartbeat
probes.description: The RollSeasonPhaseJob ran successfully within the last 90 minutes (the hourly cron has a 30-minute grace before this alerts). Feeds ops alerting when the scheduler is stuck.

probes.name: season-inbound-fk-drift
probes.description: No Team / AthleteEnrollment / Event / Session row references a hard-deleted Season. Every FK is RESTRICT so this should never happen — probe catches direct SQL manipulation.
